ques: Find a hotel in Sydney with a rating of 8 or higher, providing free Wi-Fi and parking, available for a four-night stay starting on July 10, 2026.
answer: Mary MacKillop Place (North Sydney), rated 9.0/10 with free Wi-Fi and free on-site parking, is available for the 4-night stay July 10–14, 2026; other matches include Studio 8 Residences Ryde (9.0) and Wildlife Retreat at Taronga (9.4).
